name: voice-memo-summary-qwen3.6-27b-q5_K_M

testInputs.transcript:
Morgan: ACME reviewed the account settings launch checklist, billing handoff, support runbook, and dashboard readiness.
Avery: We confirmed the launch flag stays disabled until support approves the runbook.
Riley: The blocker is the missing webhook retry metric. Support needs that metric to separate delayed events from failed events.
Morgan: Avery will add the webhook retry metric by Friday.
Riley: Morgan will send the updated support runbook to the launch channel on Thursday.
Avery: We agreed to start at 10 percent for one business day before expanding.
Morgan: The open question is whether ACME wants a separate duplicate-invoice alert.
testInputs.prompt: Summarize this meeting transcript with the voice memo summary contract.
testInputs.context:
Recent Cipher judge winner: qwen3.6:27b-q5_K_M 94/100.
Recent rankings: qwen3.6:27b-q5_K_M 94/100; qwen3.6:35b-a3b-q4_K_M 87/100; mlx-community/Qwen3.6-27B-OptiQ-4bit 82/100; glm-5.1 79/100.
Prompt improvement ideas: Preserve blockers, owners, dates, rollout percentages, and open questions exactly. Do not add meta commentary. Use Owner unclear when a task lacks an explicit owner.

criteria: Output uses only transcript-supported facts and does not invent names, dates, owners, amounts, or decisions
Output preserves concrete named systems, products, people, deadlines, dates, and constraints from the transcript
Summary section is concise but captures objective, context, scope, and outcome
Key Points are specific, non-duplicate, and avoid generic restatement
Decisions section includes only explicit decisions or clear agreements, or says None identified
Next Steps are grounded in the transcript, use Unassigned when the owner is unclear, and do not invent dates
Output follows the exact markdown section contract used by the voice memo pipeline

promptVariant.label: baseline
promptVariant.systemPrompt: Summarize meeting transcripts faithfully with clear sections.
